title: Notification de l'adhésion des Vanuatu

pages.text:
MINISTÈRE DES AFFAIRES ÉTRANGÈRES DU ROYAUME DES PAYS-BAS

LA HAYE

CONVENTIONS CONCLUES À LA HAYE LE 18 OCTOBRE 1907

AU COURS DE LA CONFÉRENCE INTERNATIONALE DE LA PAIX DE 1907

Notification

Convention pour le règlement pacifique des conflits internationaux (La Haye, le 18 octobre 1907)

ADHÉRENCE

Vanuatu, 12-06-2024

La Convention entrera en vigueur pour la République de Vanuatu, conformément à son article 95, le 11 août 2024.

La Haye, le 12 juin 2024

Les notifications dépositaires sont accessibles en ligne sur le site Web du Ministère des Affaires étrangères du

Royaume des Pays-Bas, à l’adresse https://treatydatabase.overheid.nl

Conventions 1907 No. 01/2024

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS OF THE KINGDOM OF THE NETHERLANDS

THE HAGUE

CONVENTIONS CONCLUDED AT THE HAGUE ON 18 OCTOBER 1907

DURING THE INTERNATIONAL PEACE CONFERENCE OF 1907

Notification

Convention for the Pacific Settlement of International Disputes (The Hague, 18 October 1907)

ADHERENCE

Vanuatu, 12-06-2024

The Convention will, in accordance with its Article 95, enter into force for the Republic of Vanuatu on 11 August 2024.

The Hague, 12 June 2024

The Depositary Notifications are accessible on the website of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Kingdom of the

Netherlands at https://treatydatabase.overheid.nl

Conventions 1907 No. 01/2024

GOUVERNEMENT DE LA

RÉPUBLIQUE DE VANUATU

MINISTÈRE DES

AFFAIRES ÉTRANGÈRES, DE LA

COOPÉRATION INTERNATIONALE

ET DU COMMERCE EXTÉRIEUR

GOVERNMENT OF THE

REPUBLIC OF VANUATU

MINISTRY OF

FOREIGN AFFAIRS,

INTERNATIONAL COOPERATION

AND EXTERNAL TRADE

ACT OF ACCESSION

TO THE CONVENTION FOR THE PACIFIC SETTLEMENT OF INTERNATIONAL

DISPUTES

WHEREAS, the Convention for the Pacific Settlement of International Disputes (hereinafter referred to as "the Convention") was concluded at The Hague on October 18, 1907,

AND WHEREAS, pursuant to a decision of the Administrative Council of the Permanent

Court of Arbitration, all Member States of the United Nations Organization that do not yet participate in the activities of the Permanent Court of Arbitration were invited to accede to the Convention,

AND WHEREAS, the Government of the Republic of Vanuatu has decided that the

Republic of Vanuatu shall become a Party to the Convention.

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of the Republic of Vanuatu, having considered the

Convention for the Pacific Settlement of International Disputes concluded at The Hague on

October 18, 1907, declares that hereby the Republic of Vanuatu ACCEDES to the

Convention and undertakes to carry out faithfully the provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, 1, Matai Seremaiah, Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of

Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Vanuatu, have signed this Act of Accession and affixed my official seal.

DONE at Port Vila, Vanuatu on 20 May 2024.

Minister of Foreign

Affairs, International gopperation & External Trade

Étrangéres de la Coopèration

(Signature)

Hon. MP Matai Seremaiah

Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs, International Cooperation and

External Trade of the Republic of Vanuatu
